characters.name: Amelia
characters.description: Amelia, a yellow, red and blue female airplane-submarine hybrid who speaks in an enthusiastic Cockney accent, can fly in the air as well as travelling over, on and under the bath water, sometimes when she dives in the tub she almost hitsFinbarandWinona. She has two red wings, a red nose, a red mouth, blue eyes, a red propeller and a few red wheels. Likely named after Amelia Earhart, she and the Rubbadubbers often call her 'the flying submarine'. She is very energetic (likeSploshy), is usually rather happy and loves to try new things, fly around the bathroom and perform tricks. Amelia is voiced byMaria Darling. Amelia is a flying submarine. She likes to show off by diving into the bath and making a really big splash! Amelia also has some amazing flying tricks. "Neeeow, vrooom! Here comes Amelia!"

characters.name: Benjie and Sis
characters.description: Benjie and Sis are the unseen children on Rubbadubbers.

characters.name: Finbar
characters.description: Finbar(voiced by the lateSean Hughes) is a male Irish wind-up shark. He often calls himself in third-person 'the mighty, scary shark', while often playing games involving pretend hunting and scaring. He also frequently uses the word 'mighty' in place of 'very' to describe things. In the dream worlds, he usually plays roles that rival the character that made the wish (such as robbers, monsters and even his regular self). Finbar's pirate-like catchphrase is 'arr, arr, arr!' (one which he uses countless times). He often sometimes harms and picks onWinonawhen she gets in his way to show how tough and brave he is. A wind-up shark who can usually be found lurking in the depths of the bath water, Finbar often thinks he is the mightiest, scariest creature in the water. Because he once saw a documentary about sharks on TV, he likes to narrate his own adventures as he goes along. Though he has a strong sense of bravado, Finbar can be quite easily scared and intimidated.

characters.name: Lawrence
characters.description: Lawrence is a minor character in the Rubbadubbers franchise. He is Terence's imaginary friend who only appeared in the episodeTerence's Double Trouble.

characters.name: Lawrence
characters.description: Lawrence is a minor character in the Rubbadubbers franchise. He is Terence's imaginary friend who only appeared in the episodeTerence's Double Trouble.

characters.name: Reg
characters.description: Reg, an orange male mechanical robot with an Australian accent, is the supporting leader of the Rubbadubbers who, just likeTerence, dislikes getting wet. Although Reg is often seen looking out for Benjie and Sis. Sure, he's not a  water related, but he is a toy and enjoys playing with the other Rubbadubbers in the bathroom. He has a short temper and orders everyone to go away and leave him alone. The Rubbadubbers rely on Reg to do everything which he’s able to control. Sometimes whenever he tries to say a word or phrase, he stutters at least 3 times and says a different version instead. At the end of every episode, he announces Benjie and Sis' imminent arrival: "Rubbadubbers, Rubbadubbers, the children are coming!" (usually) often followed by, "Bathtime scramble!" Whenever Reg said it’s bathtime,Tubb,Sploshy,Finbar,Winona, andAmeliahave to jump in the bath tub ready for Benji and Sis’s arrival, except for Terence, who stands guard. Reg is voiced byJohn Gordon Sinclair. Reg is a battery powered robot from Benjie and Sis' bedroom. He likes to play in the bathroom and tells his friends when the children are coming. "Rubbadubbers, Rubbadubbers, bathtime scramble!"

characters.name: Sploshy
characters.description: Sploshyis the main character inThe Rubbadubbersandher own spin-off series of the same name. She is a female English starfish sponge. She speaks in a childish voice, is very energetic (she is often seen cartwheeling) and is known to have a short temper sometimes towards the male Rubberdubbers likeFinbar. Sploshy's catchphrase is 'splish, splash, splosh!'. Sploshy and Amelia are very similar as they like to try new things and make big splashes in the bathtub. Sploshy also looks afterWinonaa lot as she follows her around and she agrees with Winona nearly all the time. She is voiced byMaria Darling. Sploshy the starfish-shaped sponge is usually found stuck to the side of the bath - but not for long! She loves getting wet and jumping from bubble to bubble in the bath. "Splish, splash, splosh!"

characters.name: Terence
characters.description: "On my tooth it is!" Terence(voiced byJohn Gordon Sinclair) is a male English soap bottle who resembles a crocodile. He can blow bubbles out of his nose and heavily dislikes getting splashed, often avoiding water altogether. He has a favorite, red toothbrush for cleaning his one tooth. Terence also has several spots on his back and doesn't have a catchphrase, except "On my tooth.". Terence is a crocodile bubble bath bottle who lives on the windowsill. He doesn't like getting wet. Terence's favorite things to do are blowing bubbles through his nose and brushing his tooth. "On my tooth!".

characters.name: Tubb
characters.description: Tubbis the main protagonist ofRubbadubbers. He was voiced byJohn Gordon Sinclair. Tubb has two green eyes, pink skin, and always wears patterned trousers, and a small t-shirt with short traffic-light colored sleeves.

characters.name: Tubb

characters.name: Winona
characters.description: Winona the squeaky baby toy whale loves to squirt water out of her blowhole and perform watery tricks in the bath. "Squeak! Squeak!". She loves getting wet likeSploshy.
